# Qahwa House — Specialty Coffee Roastery & Café Dubai

## About
Qahwa House is a specialty coffee roastery and café located in Dubai Design District (d3).
Founded in 2021 by Layla and Omar Al-Rashid.

## Services
- Specialty espresso drinks (Desert Rose Latte, Saffron Cortado, Cardamom Flat White)
- Pour-over bar with rotating single-origin coffees
- Cold brew and seasonal drinks
- Light kitchen menu (Za'atar croissant, shakshuka, toasts)
- In-house roastery with 12kg Probat roaster
- Wholesale bean orders
- Corporate events and roastery tours

## Location
Unit G-04, Building 7, Dubai Design District (d3), Dubai, UAE

## Hours
Monday–Friday: 7:00am–9:00pm
Saturday–Sunday: 8:00am–10:00pm

## Contact
Phone: +971 4 123 4567
WhatsApp: +971 4 123 4567
Website: https://qahwa-house.vercel.app
